settings.title: Keystoned Now Offers Saturday Evening Viewings
settings.excerpt: House hunting should fit around your week, so we have added later slots when most people are actually free.
settings.body:
Plenty of buyers can only view properties outside working hours, and a Tuesday at two in the afternoon helps no one with a full-time job. So we have changed our hours to match.

Keystoned now runs viewings on Saturday evenings until eight. For sellers it means a wider pool of serious buyers. For buyers it means seeing a home without taking a day off work.

Booking takes a couple of minutes by phone or online. We would rather meet you when you are relaxed than squeezed into a lunch break.
